hooks.command: name=$(jq -r '.name // empty' | tr -d '\r'); [ -z "$name" ] && name="wt-$$"; dir="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/worktrees/$name"; branch="claude/$name"; if [ -d "$dir" ] && [ ! -e "$dir/.git" ]; then rm -rf "$dir"; fi; if [ ! -d "$dir" ]; then git worktree prune >&2; git worktree add "$dir" -B "$branch" >&2 || exit 1; fi; cd "$dir" || exit 1; bun install --silent >&2 || echo "warning: bun install failed in $dir -- dependencies may be missing, run 'bun install' manually" >&2; printf '%s\n' "$dir"
